functions.notes: SYM lists alias __aFlmul at the same address (signed/unsigned long mul share code); this impl covers both
register calling convention: P0 in SI/DI, P1 in DX/BX, bounds in DGROUP 0x1D7A/0x1D78, near call; not stack-args
ret corrected near->far: IR exits are retf-only and the cont.218-era recovery note says 'executes a genuine ret far' — the map had a clerical error.

streaming resumable decoder; ASM ABI is far cdecl (dst=[bp+6:8], budget=[bp+10]) with cross-call state in DGROUP B7C0..B7D4 -- pure-core signature differs, see hooks._make_unpack_island for the marshalling
defined but never called anywhere (dead code)
whole-buffer convenience API over decode_chunk; no ASM twin
shared LFSR step of the whole _SRand* family

islands.notes: no SYM symbol at address (compiler-emitted mid-routine loop lift, not a function)
